summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 2 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:933 — Failure diagnostics use `console.log` (stdout); switch to `console.error` so non-zero-exit reasons aren't lost when stdout is piped.

The two prior 🟡 tester findings are resolved: strict `exitCode === 2` and no-STATE.json-task-list assertions are now in place. No production code changed. Re-ran `test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs` locally — 4/4 pass; full suite 581/0.
